programs.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programs.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programs.title: Hit-And-Miss Tour
programs.desc: The Dokbakz are in Australia, and it's time to feast on some meat! For dinner, they head to a famous restaurant known for its ribs. But before that, they start their second day in Sydney at Rocks Market.

programs.title: Zombie House Flipping
programs.desc: The zombie team has their work cut out for them when they discover a 3bed/2bath might be missing a bedroom! Termites, collapsing ceilings and some surprises might just be a budget-buster.

programs.title: Masterchef Australia
programs.desc: Eight eliminated contestants return for the chance to cook their way back into the competition. They have 75 minutes to cook a winning dish with a herb allocated at random.

programs.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programs.desc: Taiwanese cuisine boasts wide variations of chicken soup, and Chef A-lin has a special recipe. Learn more about how Chef A-lin creates the most complex flavor with the most elegant approach.

programs.title: Jake Makes It Easy
programs.sub_title: Schnitzel Sandwich Celery Root Remoulade & Chocolate Chip Cookie Brittle
programs.desc: Taking inspiration from one of his husband's favourite dishes as a child, Jake makes celery-root remoulade and adds a European twist to the fried chicken sandwich.
